item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Juicy Danish pork cutlets – Tender and succulent pork cutletscooked in a creamy tomato sauce with plenty of fresh vegetables. Served withnutty brown rice, topped with crispy potato chips, crumbled bacon, and freshherbs (6, 13, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: West African roasted chicken in Maafe – Juicy roasted chickenin a rich peanut sauce with seasonal vegetables. Served with fragrant jasmineor brown rice, topped with crushed peanuts and freshly chopped parsley.Accompanied by lime on the side (4, 13, 15). GREEN DISH: West African pinto bean Koose – Crispy fried bean cakes in thesame creamy peanut sauce with vegetables. Served with jasmine or brown rice,topped with crushed peanuts and freshly chopped parsley. Accompanied by lime onthe side (4, 13, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Beef ragout – An intense and rich stew with tender beef, slowly cookedin a deep sauce with herbs and spices. Served with creamy polenta and a freshherb salsa (10, 15). GREEN DISH: Mushroom ragout GREEN DISH: An intense vegetarian stew with hearty mushrooms,cooked in a deep sauce with herbs and spices. Served with creamy polenta andfresh herb salsa (10, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Pasta al Fredo with Chicken – Creamy pasta with melted cheese and tenderchicken pieces with crispy skin. A simple yet delicious classic (1, 6, 15). GREEN DISH: Pasta al Fredo with Beans and Sun-Dried Tomatoes GREEN DISH: A vegetarian versionwith creamy cheese sauce, hearty beans, and sweet sun-dried tomatoes (1, 6,15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Hungarian goulash – A hearty stew with tender beef, plenty ofcabbage, and seasonal vegetables, spiced with smoked paprika and caraway.Served with smoked paprika rice and crispy fried bread (6, 13, 15). GREEN DISH: Hungarian goulash with tofu GREEN DISH: A vegetarian version withmarinated tofu, cabbage, and seasonal vegetables, served with smoked paprikarice and crispy fried bread (6, 13, 15).
